q1.q: Where does VeedorIA's data come from?
q1.a: VeedorIA connects directly to DGCP Open Data APIs, the Fiscal Transparency portal, and OCDS sources. We use international price oracles for real-time benchmarking.

q2.q: How does the platform guarantee analysis neutrality?
q2.a: Our AI models use open architecture (Sovereign AI). The overprice detection algorithms are public and auditable by any civil society organization.

q3.a: It is our commitment to data ownership. All analysis infrastructure resides on secure servers under protocols that allow Dominican institutions to audit their own processes without relying on foreign technological black boxes.
